opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every inch of my body is aching, my hands are swollen tight, and I'm too exhausted to even sit up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on hard over the last two days and I can't get out of bed — I need something for the pain and to know if it's serious.

symptom_narrative.onset: it flared up fast over about the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: the widespread aching has been building for two days
symptom_narrative.character: a deep aching all over, and my hands feel tight and puffy
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: honestly a 9 out of 10, everything hurts to touch
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: everywhere — shoulders, hips, my whole back, and my hands and knuckles
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst in the morning, I'm stiff for hours before I can move
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: heat packs help a little, and lying very still
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement, and even the sheets touching my skin over my shoulders and hips
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: terrible fatigue and my brain feels foggy, I can't think straight
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get flares of the aching before but this one is worse and my hands are more swollen than usual
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed tonight, I haven't even been able to get to the kitchen for a drink

family_history_as_reported.narrative: I think my mother had some kind of arthritis too

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live on my own and today I couldn't move enough to keep my fluids up

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, tired messages, emphasises how bad the pain and exhaustion are

objective_data_offered.value: 37.3 C on my thermometer at home
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single home reading, not a substitute for clinical assessment

objective_data_offered.value: my knuckles on both hands look a bit puffy and feel tight
